summary: Tested Gemini TTS integration (new feature). Backend: 10/11 tests passed (91%). GET /api/gemini-voices returns 30 voices correctly. POST /api/gemini-tts-preview returns WAV audio. Project CRUD with tts_provider=gemini works. Frontend: Voice Picker Modal has 3 tabs (Microsoft Free, Gemini Free, Google Cloud Premium). Gemini tab shows 30 voices with preview. Actor card shows GM badge when Gemini voice selected. Fixed bug: previewEdgeVoice -> previewGcloudVoice in Google Cloud tab.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 error when testing multiple voices in quick succession (likely Gemini API rate limiting)

design_issues.screen: Voice Picker Modal - Google Cloud tab
issues: Shows 0 voices when target language is Khmer (km) because Google Cloud TTS doesn't support Khmer. This is expected behavior but could be confusing to users.

passed_tests: GET /api/gemini-voices returns 30 voices with name, gender, style
GET /api/gemini-voices - all voices have correct structure (name, gender, style)
GET /api/gemini-voices - gender distribution includes both male and female voices
POST /api/gemini-tts-preview returns WAV audio with RIFF header
PATCH /api/projects/{id} updates actor with tts_provider=gemini, gemini_voice=Kore
GET /api/projects/{id} returns project with Gemini actor settings
DELETE /api/projects/{id} deletes project and verifies removal
Frontend: Voice Picker Modal has 3 tabs: Microsoft (Free), Gemini (Free), Google Cloud (Premium)
Frontend: Gemini tab shows 30 voices with name, gender, style, FREE badge
Frontend: Gemini tab has search and gender filter (All/Boy/Girl)
Frontend: Selecting Gemini voice updates actor card with GM badge
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Gemini Voice: Kore (Firm)' after selection
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in VoicePickerModal.jsx line 260: previewEdgeVoice was undefined, changed to previewGcloudVoice

success_rate.backend: 91% (10/11 tests passed - 1 intermittent failure due to API rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Voice Picker Modal with 3 tabs works correctly)

test_credentials: Session Token: test_session_001, User ID: test-user-001 (temporarily changed to user_49a58c10cb06 for testing projects with actors)
seed_data_creation: Used existing projects proj_d496b94aba2c and proj_e332a33d0335 with actors for Voice Picker testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gemini TTS integration tested successfully. Backend endpoints /api/gemini-voices (30 voices) and /api/gemini-tts-preview (WAV audio) work correctly. Voice Picker Modal now has 3 tabs: Microsoft Edge TTS (free), Gemini TTS (free, 30 AI voices), Google Cloud TTS (premium, 2066 voices). Actor data supports tts_provider ('edge'|'gcloud'|'gemini'), gemini_voice field. GM badge shows in actor card when Gemini voice selected. Test session: test_session_001.

gemini_tts_notes.rate_limiting: Free tier with rate limits - may cause intermittent 500 errors on rapid requests
